title: scandix australis subsp. balcanica
intro: Scandix australis subsp. balcanica is a sub-species of the Scandix australis plant, also known as the Balkan Shepherd's Needle, a type of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Scandix australis subsp. balcanica include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
